violations.text: Utensils (ice cream scoops) were observed stored in stagnant water between uses in the dipper well. Ice cream scoops were removed and cleaned during time of inspection. Dipper well was turned back on and must remain on when storing utensils. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2024
The receptacle in the unisex toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2023
